mapper.select: SELECT medicine_id AS medicineId, medicine_name AS medicineName, batch_number AS batchNumber, SUM(loss_quantity) AS totalLossQuantity, MAX(create_time) AS latestTime FROM clinic_pack_loss_record WHERE is_processed = 0 GROUP BY medicine_id, medicine_name, batch_number ORDER BY latestTime DESC

SELECT id, medicine_id, medicine_name, loss_quantity, related_record_id, batch_number, is_processed, create_time, operator_name FROM clinic_pack_loss_record WHERE medicine_id = #{medicineId} AND is_processed = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE clinic_pack_loss_record SET is_processed = 1 WHERE medicine_id = #{medicineId} AND is_processed = 0
